shortDescription: Home Affairs · Points-tested PR · Skills assessment · EOI

policyAlert.summary: Confirm current skills assessment fees and visa charges on homeaffairs.gov.au. Invitation depends on points and occupation ceiling—never promise invitation.

alert.title: Points and invitation required
alert.body: EOI in SkillSelect does not guarantee invitation. Points, occupation demand, and state nomination (190/491) determine outcome.

about.label: Description
about.value: Permanent residence via points-tested skilled migration. Subclass 189 (independent), 190 (state nominated), 491 (regional provisional). Requires skills assessment, EOI, and invitation.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Occupation on relevant skilled list · Positive skills assessment · 65+ points (competitive higher) · Age under 45 · Competent English · Health and character

about.label: Invitation not guaranteed
about.value: Minimum 65 points does not guarantee invitation. Competitive scores often 80–90+ for popular occupations.

about.label: Key authority
about.value: Department of Home Affairs · Skills assessing authorities · State/territory governments (190/491)

about.label: After approval
about.value: Permanent visa (189/190) or provisional 491 leading to 191 PR. Meet residence conditions for regional visas.

redFlagsBanner: Without invitation, do not lodge visa application. Improve points via PTE/IELTS, NAATI, partner skills, or state nomination before expecting invite.

redFlags.title: Points below competitive threshold
redFlags.description: Client has 65 points but occupation invites at 85+.
redFlags.fix: Improve English to superior; partner skills; state nomination 190/491

redFlags.title: Skills assessment delayed or negative
redFlags.description: Assessing body finds insufficient experience or wrong ANZSCO.
redFlags.fix: Match ANZSCO duties; detailed reference letters before assessment

redFlags.title: Age turning 45
redFlags.fix: Expedite EOI; assess age points decline at 33 and 40

redFlags.title: Wrong ANZSCO code
redFlags.description: Occupation code does not match actual duties.
redFlags.fix: Verify with assessing authority before skills assessment fee

redFlags.title: State nomination requirements not met
redFlags.fix: Research state occupation lists and commitment requirements

redFlags.title: Documents not ready at invitation
redFlags.fix: Prepare document templates while in EOI pool

faqs.a: No. SkillSelect invitation depends on points and occupation demand. Never promise invitation or PR.
189 independent; 190 state nominated (+5 points); 491 regional provisional (+15 points, leads to 191).
Superior English, skilled partner, Australian study, NAATI CCL, state nomination, work experience.
Varies by occupation—ACS for IT, Engineers Australia, VETASSESS, etc.
Must be under 45 at time of invitation.
Yes—skilled migration is offshore application after invitation.
Skilled partner adds points; partner English and skills assessment may help.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never guarantee visa or immigration approval; use approved-language only
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, government, and third-party costs
proTips: Calculate points honestly with official calculator
Prepare documents while waiting in pool

changelog.author: Service Library
changelog.summary: Expanded quiz to 75 levelled questions (25 per level).

changelog.author: Service Library
changelog.summary: Initial Australia skilled migration counselor content.

staffNotes.author: Documentation team
staffNotes.text: Never collect full visa fee before invitation—EOI and skills assessment fees only until invite received.

quiz.question: Minimum points for EOI:
quiz.explanation: 65 minimum but competitive higher.

quiz.question: Skills assessment required:
options: Never
Yes from relevant assessing authority
Only passport
Employer letter only
quiz.explanation: Mandatory for most occupations.

quiz.question: Invitation guaranteed at 65 points:
options: Yes always
No—depends on occupation demand
Automatic
By lottery only
quiz.explanation: Competitive invitation system.

quiz.question: Age limit for skilled migration:
options: No limit
Under 45 at invitation
Under 18 only
Over 60
quiz.explanation: 45 age cap.

quiz.question: Counselors must never:
options: Calculate points
Guarantee invitation or PR
Track invitation rounds
Prepare skills assessment
quiz.explanation: No guarantees.
